text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi

New revision: 495306
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/495306

Log:
  New port: sysutils/dsbsu

  DSBSu is a simple Qt frontend to FreeBSD's su(1). It allows you to execute
  a command as root.

  WWW: http://freeshell.de/~mk/projects/dsbsu.html

  PR:		236430
  Submitted by:	Marcel Kaiser <mk@nic-nac-project.org>

  head/sysutils/dsbsu/
  head/sysutils/dsbsu/Makefile
  head/sysutils/dsbsu/distinfo
  head/sysutils/dsbsu/pkg-descr
